top_signals.title: Tochigi robbery-murder suspect tried to flee to South Korea
top_signals.summary: The 28-year-old alleged instructor of the crime was taken into custody shortly before his planned flight to Seoul at Tokyo's Haneda Airport in the early hours of Sunday.
